query:
SELECT
            COALESCE(a.name, 'unknown') AS "bucket_label!: String",
            COUNT(*) AS "n!: i64",
            COALESCE(SUM(b.duration_ms), 0) AS "hours_ms!: i64"
         FROM books b
         LEFT JOIN authors a ON a.author_id = b.author_id
         WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL
         GROUP BY b.author_id
         ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
